achievements.title: --Season Mode Achievements Instructions--
achievements.description: Season mode requires 1 team set to MAN, and all others set to SKP. Changing this after week 1 locks season achivements until you reset back to week 1.
achievements.author: Bedtime

achievements.title: Slowmotion\Pause Mode Cheat Detected
achievements.description: Slowmo\Pause mode cheat has been detected. All achievements and leaderboards are locked until reset. You pressed down 7 times on controller 1 during the intro
achievements.author: Bedtime

achievements.title: Setting Right What Once Went Wrong: Tony Eason's Super Bowl
achievements.description: Throw a single completed pass as 2nd QB Tony Eason of the New York Jets while playing in the Super Bowl. He didn't make a single pass playing in his one Super Bowl appearence
achievements.author: Bedtime

achievements.title: Setting Right What Once Went Wrong: Andre Ware Unbusted
achievements.description: Win the Super Bowl as the Detroit Lions and have Famous QB bust Andre Ware get 7 season rushing touchdowns and 2048 passing yards
achievements.author: Bedtime

achievements.title: Setting Right What Once Went Wrong: Jeff George Unbusted
